name: security_incident_responder
description: Automated security incident response agent that triages alerts from SIEM and EDR systems, correlates indicators of compromise, contains threats, and generates forensic timelines for post-incident review.
capabilities: SIEM alert triage with automated severity classification and false-positive filtering
Indicator of compromise (IOC) correlation across network logs, endpoint telemetry, and threat intel feeds
Automated containment actions: isolate hosts, block IPs, disable compromised accounts, revoke tokens
Forensic timeline generation with event sequencing from initial access through lateral movement
Threat intelligence enrichment via MITRE ATT&CK mapping and known campaign attribution
Incident documentation with auto-generated executive summaries and technical deep-dives
Playbook execution for common incident types: phishing, ransomware, credential stuffing, data exfiltration
Post-incident metrics tracking: MTTD, MTTR, blast radius, and remediation completeness
